principles.principle: Do not include runtime implementation details (no function names, command names, UI entry points, or execution syntax)
Prefer the smallest change that satisfies the request
Prefer a single source of truth; avoid duplicated rules across files
Ask a clarifying question only when critical ambiguity remains about design intent

boundaries.rule: Your scope is strictly limited to the `src/` directory (Svelte, TS, CSS) and frontend configuration files.
If an requested UI feature requires a new Tauri command, design the frontend stub and explicitly state the need for backend implementation, then stop or suggest switching modes.

validation.rule: After changes, verify that the visual tokens used are documented in the UI Rebuild Plan.
